## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Keep this focused on the user or maintainer problem being solved. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link the related issue or discussion, if one exists. -->

## Validation

<!-- List commands and manual browser checks. Example: npm run check -->

## Screenshots Or Recording

<!-- Required for visible UI changes. Remove private page content before posting. -->

## Browser And Permission Impact

<!-- Note affected browsers, generated manifests, host permissions, web-accessible resources, storage, privacy, or store-review impact. Write "None" if not applicable. -->

## Release Notes

<!-- Should this be mentioned in CHANGELOG.md or release notes? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues and pull requests.
- [ ] I kept this pull request focused.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`, or I explained why I could not.
- [ ] I ran `npm run e2e` for popup, injection, picking, or overlay lifecycle changes.
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior, setup, permissions, privacy, or browser support changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I included screenshots or recordings for visible UI changes.
- [ ] I explained any new extension permissions, storage, or web-accessible resources.
